title: The P exists only as absence — a window cut through solid amber material. The surrounding field is the unbreakable governed contract; the P-shaped void proves that inside every Precept domain, everything is always visible and inspectable by design.
conceptualBridge: The negative-space P means inspectability because the governed contract is the solid field and the interior is visible only through what the definition allows.
decision: Kept: avg 4.31, no hard fails — negative-space letterform with specific inspectability metaphor; the inversion of positive space makes a striking, memorable icon that communicates 'everything inside is visible by design'.
